istg it might be the windows spoolsv (printer) service
@quadstuffed try putting the game on high priority
sometimes that fixes it
you really wanna get a pattern down in phase 1 because phase 2 is going to take multiple attempts
you could pass it first try I guess but better not to rely on that
also I found it easier to hit him without autofire but I do mash somewhat fast so it might not be better for everyone
just because mashing like slower than autofire makes your shots spaced out more
so it's like a wider vertical range that'll hit him
yeah high prio doesn’t work but restarting in safe mode seems to fix
I also found no autofire better for phase 2 because it requires you to think less about how you're shooting
and you need the focus in phase 2
the crystal balls in phase 4 are also pattern
if you shoot him in the same spot they'll always be exactly the same
well no you can just wait until he goes to a certain spot
and then start attack 4
you can look at his healthbar
i think disconnecting from my printer actually fixed the lag wow
